name: Crunchy Vegetable Rolls with Soy Dipping Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon fresh ginger root, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Spray heavy baking sheet with vegetable oil spray.
2. Heat 1 teaspoon sesame oil in a large nonstick skillet over high heat. Add green onions, garlic, and ginger; stir-fry for 1 minute.
3. Add spinach, mushrooms, zucchini, and carrot; stir-fry until vegetables are crisp-tender and spinach wilts, about 3 minutes. Add 4 teaspoons soy sauce and stir to coat the vegetables for 30 seconds.
4. Transfer the mixture to a colander and drain off liquid. Let it cool completely.
5. Place egg roll wrappers on a work surface. Spoon filling into a 4x2-inch rectangle in the center of each wrapper, dividing equally. Fold in short sides, then roll up tightly. Arrange seam side down on the prepared sheet.
6. Bake until the wrappers are crisp and the filling is heated through, turning once, about 10 minutes.
7. Meanwhile, mix vinegar and remaining 1 teaspoon sesame oil with 3 tablespoons soy sauce in a small bowl.
8. Transfer rolls to plates. Serve warm with dipping sauce.
